name: SnapShotsClient
summary: This is the abstract interface class for all Snapshot clients.

methods.name: AnimateDocument
methods.signature: public abstract bool AnimateDocument(RhinoDoc doc, double dPos, BinaryArchiveReader archive_start, BinaryArchiveReader archive_stop)
methods.summary: Called for each frame. Starting at 0.0.

params.name: doc
params.doc: doc is the current document.

params.name: dPos
params.doc: dPos is the current frame. Starting at 0.0.

params.name: archive_start
params.doc: archive_start is a archive to the data of the starting position.

params.name: archive_stop
params.doc: archive_stop is a archive to the data of the ending position.

methods.name: AnimateObject
methods.signature: public abstract bool AnimateObject(RhinoDoc doc, RhinoObject doc_object, ref Transform transform, double dPos, BinaryArchiveReader archive_start, BinaryArchiveReader archive_stop)
methods.summary: Called for each frame. Starting at 0.0.

params.name: doc
params.doc: doc is the current document.

params.name: doc_object
params.doc: doc_obj is the current object.

params.name: transform
params.doc: transform is a transformation matrix. The matrix is set to identity the first time an object is associated with a snapshot. After that the matrix is updated when the object is transformed(scale, rotate etc.).

params.name: dPos
params.doc: dPos is the current frame. Starting at 0.0.

params.name: archive_start
params.doc: archive_start is a archive to the data of the starting position.

params.name: archive_stop
params.doc: archive_stop is a archive to the data of the ending position.

methods.name: AnimationStart
methods.signature: public abstract void AnimationStart(RhinoDoc doc, int iFrames)
methods.summary: Called once at the start of an animation.

params.name: doc
params.doc: doc is the current document.

params.name: iFrames
params.doc: iFrames is the number of frames to be animated.

methods.name: AnimationStop
methods.summary: Called once at the end of an animation.

params.name: doc
params.doc: doc is the current document.

methods.name: ApplicationCategory
methods.summary: Predefined application category

methods.name: Category
methods.summary: The category of this client. Usually one of the above predefined categories like e.g object, rendering or application category

methods.name: ClientId
methods.summary: The unique id of this client.

returns.doc: The unique id of this client.

methods.name: Dispose
methods.summary: SnapShotsClient Dispose

methods.name: DocumentCategory
methods.summary: Predefined document category

methods.name: ExtendBoundingBoxForDocumentAnimation
methods.signature: public abstract void ExtendBoundingBoxForDocumentAnimation(RhinoDoc doc, BinaryArchiveReader archive_start, BinaryArchiveReader archive_stop, ref BoundingBox bbox)
methods.summary: Called once at the start of an animation. This can be used to extend the scene bounding box to avoid clipping.

params.name: doc
params.doc: doc is the current document.

params.name: archive_start
params.doc: archive_start is a archive to the data of the starting position.

params.name: archive_stop
params.doc: archive_stop is a archive to the data of the ending position.

params.name: bbox
params.doc: bbox is the current scene bounding box.

methods.name: ExtendBoundingBoxForObjectAnimation
methods.signature: public abstract void ExtendBoundingBoxForObjectAnimation(RhinoDoc doc, RhinoObject doc_object, ref Transform transform, BinaryArchiveReader archive_start, BinaryArchiveReader archive_stop, ref BoundingBox bbox)
methods.summary: Called once at the start of an animation. This can be used to extend the scene bounding box to avoid clipping.

params.name: doc
params.doc: doc is the current document.

params.name: doc_object
params.doc: doc_obj is the current object.

params.name: transform
params.doc: transform is a transformation matrix. The matrix is set to identity the first time an object is associated with a snapshot. After that the matrix is updated when the object is transformed(scale, rotate etc.).

params.name: archive_start
params.doc: archive_start is a archive to the data of the starting position.

params.name: archive_stop
params.doc: archive_stop is a archive to the data of the ending position.

params.name: bbox
params.doc: bbox is the current scene bounding box.

methods.name: IsCurrentModelStateInAnySnapshot(RhinoDoc, BinaryArchiveReader, SimpleArrayBinaryArchiveReader, TextLog)
methods.signature: public abstract bool IsCurrentModelStateInAnySnapshot(RhinoDoc doc, BinaryArchiveReader archive, SimpleArrayBinaryArchiveReader archive_array, TextLog text_log = null)
methods.summary: Called before restoring a snapshot. Warns the user if the current model state is not already saved.

params.name: doc
params.doc: doc is the current document.

params.name: archive
params.doc: archive is the current state of the model.

params.name: archive_array
params.doc: archive_array is a list of client data.

params.name: text_log
params.doc: text_log is used to list the missing items that cannot be found in the current model.

returns.doc: return true if successful, otherwise false.

methods.name: IsCurrentModelStateInAnySnapshot(RhinoDoc, RhinoObject, BinaryArchiveReader, SimpleArrayBinaryArchiveReader, TextLog)
methods.signature: public abstract bool IsCurrentModelStateInAnySnapshot(RhinoDoc doc, RhinoObject doc_object, BinaryArchiveReader archive, SimpleArrayBinaryArchiveReader archive_array, TextLog text_log = null)
methods.summary: Called before restoring a snapshot. Warns the user if the current model state is not already saved.

params.name: doc
params.doc: doc is the current document.

params.name: doc_object
params.doc: doc_object is the current object.

params.name: archive
params.doc: archive is the current state of the model.

params.name: archive_array
params.doc: archive_array is a list of client data.

params.name: text_log
params.doc: text_log is used to list the missing items that cannot be found in the current model.

returns.doc: return true if successful, otherwise false.

methods.name: LayersCategory
methods.summary: Predefined layers category

methods.name: LightsCategory
methods.summary: Predefined lights category

methods.name: Name
methods.summary: The client's name.

methods.name: ObjectsCategory
methods.summary: Predefined objects category

methods.name: ObjectTransformNotification
methods.signature: public abstract bool ObjectTransformNotification(RhinoDoc doc, RhinoObject doc_object, ref Transform transform, BinaryArchiveReader archive)
methods.summary: Called for every object that is associated with a snapshot and gets transformed in Rhino. This is getting called for each stored snapshot and gives the client the possibility to update the stored data.

params.name: doc
params.doc: doc is the current document.

params.name: doc_object
params.doc: doc_obj is the current object.

params.name: transform
params.doc: transform is a transformation matrix. The matrix is set to identity the first time an object is associated with a snapshot. After that the matrix is updated when the object is transformed(scale, rotate etc.).

params.name: archive
params.doc: archive is a archive which can be used to update the stored data.

methods.name: PlugInId
methods.summary: The plug-in id that registers this client.

returns.doc: The plug-in id that registers this client.

methods.name: PrepareForDocumentAnimation
methods.signature: public abstract bool PrepareForDocumentAnimation(RhinoDoc doc, BinaryArchiveReader archive_start, BinaryArchiveReader archive_stop)
methods.summary: Called once at the start of an animation.

params.name: doc
params.doc: doc is the current document.

params.name: archive_start
params.doc: archive_start is a archive to the data of the starting position.

params.name: archive_stop
params.doc: archive_stop is a archive to the data of the ending position.

methods.name: PrepareForObjectAnimation
methods.signature: public abstract bool PrepareForObjectAnimation(RhinoDoc doc, RhinoObject doc_object, ref Transform transform, BinaryArchiveReader archive_start, BinaryArchiveReader archive_stop)
methods.summary: Called once at the start of an animation.

params.name: doc
params.doc: doc is the current document.

params.name: doc_object
params.doc: doc_obj is the current object.

params.name: transform
params.doc: transform is a transformation matrix. The matrix is set to identity the first time an object is associated with a snapshot. After that the matrix is updated when the object is transformed(scale, rotate etc.).

params.name: archive_start
params.doc: archive_start is a archive to the data of the starting position.

params.name: archive_stop
params.doc: archive_stop is a archive to the data of the ending position.

methods.name: RegisterSnapShotClient
methods.summary: Function used to register snapshots client

params.name: client
params.doc: [Missing <param name="client"/> documentation for "M:Rhino.DocObjects.SnapShots.SnapShotsClient.RegisterSnapShotClient(Rhino.DocObjects.SnapShots.SnapShotsClient)"]

methods.name: RenderingCategory
methods.summary: Predefined rendering category

methods.name: RestoreDocument
methods.signature: public abstract bool RestoreDocument(RhinoDoc doc, BinaryArchiveReader archive)
methods.summary: Called when the user restores a snapshot and SupportDocument() returns true.

params.name: doc
params.doc: doc is the current document

params.name: archive
params.doc: archive is the archive to read the data from

methods.name: RestoreObject
methods.signature: public abstract bool RestoreObject(RhinoDoc doc, RhinoObject doc_object, ref Transform transform, BinaryArchiveReader archive)
methods.summary: Called when the user restores a snapshot and SupportsObjects() and SupportsObject(Rhino.DocObjects.RhinoObject doc_object) returns true.

params.name: doc
params.doc: doc is the current document.

params.name: doc_object
params.doc: doc_obj is the current object.

params.name: transform
params.doc: transform is a transformation matrix. The matrix is set to identity the first time an object is associated with a snapshot. After that the matrix is updated when the object is transformed(scale, rotate etc.).

params.name: archive
params.doc: archive is the archive to read the data from.

methods.name: SaveDocument
methods.signature: public abstract bool SaveDocument(RhinoDoc doc, BinaryArchiveWriter archive)
methods.summary: Called when the user saves a snapshot and SupportDocument() returns true.

params.name: doc
params.doc: doc is the current document

params.name: archive
params.doc: archive is the archive to write the data to

methods.name: SaveObject
methods.signature: public abstract bool SaveObject(RhinoDoc doc, RhinoObject doc_object, ref Transform transform, BinaryArchiveWriter archive)
methods.summary: Called when the user saves a snapshot and SupportsObjects() and SupportsObject(Rhino.DocObjects.RhinoObject doc_object) returns true.

params.name: doc
params.doc: doc is the current document.

params.name: doc_object
params.doc: doc_obj is the current object.

params.name: transform
params.doc: transform is a transformation matrix. The matrix is set to identity the first time an object is associated with a snapshot. After that the matrix is updated when the object is transformed(scale, rotate etc.).

params.name: archive
params.doc: archive is the archive to write the data to.

methods.name: SnapshotRestored
methods.summary: Called after all clients restored their data.

params.name: doc
params.doc: [Missing <param name="doc"/> documentation for "M:Rhino.DocObjects.SnapShots.SnapShotsClient.SnapshotRestored(Rhino.RhinoDoc)"]

methods.name: SupportsAnimation
methods.summary: Returns true if the client allows animation.

returns.doc: true if the client allows animation.

methods.name: SupportsDocument
methods.summary: Defines if the client supports document user data or not

returns.doc: true if the client saves/restores document user data.

methods.name: SupportsObject
methods.summary: Returns true if the client saves/restores object user data for the given object.

params.name: doc_object
params.doc: doc_object is the given object

returns.doc: true if the client saves/restores object user data for the given object.

methods.name: SupportsObjects
methods.summary: Returns true if the client saves/restores object user data.

returns.doc: true if the client saves/restores object user data.

methods.name: ViewsCategory
methods.summary: Predefined views category
